Global Mega Corp

Platform Engineer

We are hiring a Platform Engineer to own our Kubernetes-based infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines. You will work with Terraform, AWS, and Go to build reliable distributed systems at scale.

Responsibilities include maintaining observability, running on-call rotations, and mentoring other engineers on best practices for cloud infrastructure.

Requirements: 5+ years of experience with Python, Kubernetes, and infrastructure as code.
